steps.t: The Chamber of Deep Thought is east through the tunnel from Durin's Threshold, then south. You should search the Chamber of Deep Thought for any relic…
The cocoon is in the Chamber of Deep Thought in the west of the Great Delving. You should search the cocoon for anything that might be of value to the…
Túbi Thickfist is at the top of the stair of Durin's Threshold. You should return to Túbi Thickfist with news of your search.
